data.body:
## Gap Analysis Amendment

### LLM Format Integration
The batch reducer outputs a JSON array. The --format=llm path (ticket-llm-format.py) currently expects newline-delimited JSON objects from stdin. When integrating: either (a) convert the JSON array to newline-delimited JSON before piping to the LLM formatter, or (b) update the pipeline. Ensure both --format=default and --format=llm paths work correctly with batch reducer output.

### Graceful Degradation
If the batch Python process exits non-zero with no stdout, emit a clear error to stderr. The existing 8 tests in test-ticket-list.sh cover both format paths and will catch regressions.
